---
title: "Setup & Prerequisites"
toc: true
---

For the live code on the Foundations page you need nothing but a browser. For the hands-on
exercises you need R and RStudio. Allow about 20 minutes.

## 1. Software

- **R** ≥ 4.3: <https://cran.rstudio.com/>
- **RStudio** (latest): <https://posit.co/downloads/>

## 2. R packages

In RStudio, run once:

```r
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "here", "janitor", "skimr", "pacman", "MASS"))
```

`tidyverse` gives you `dplyr`, `ggplot2`, `readr` and friends. `here` builds reliable file
paths. `janitor::clean_names()` tidies column names. `skimr::skim()` summarises a dataset.
`MASS` supplies the `birthwt` dataset used in the exercises.

## 3. Project

Open `DMgtAsia_DataScience_IntroR.Rproj` in RStudio. Working with an RStudio Project means
`here()` paths resolve from the project root, so your code runs the same on any machine.

## 4. Pre-flight check

```r
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
cat("R", as.character(getRversion()), "ready\n")
```

If that runs without error, you are ready. Open **Session-I**.
